reviews.comment:
Una mugre los baños
Pago más de 20 Lucas la cuota y SIEMPRE qué voy los baños un desastre. Además te cobran el agua caliente $ 300 mangos. En la Shell no te la cobran. Voy a repensarlo seguir siendo socio
Estás cosas en el ACA inaceptable

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are filthy. I pay over 20,000 pesos a month in dues and EVERY time I go, the bathrooms are a disaster. Plus, they charge 300 pesos for hot water. At Shell, they don't charge for it. I'm going to reconsider being a member. These things at the ACA are unacceptable.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1816604170739414549/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ5OUlXRmhRRRAB

Muy lentos para atender ..el secuci9 de mesa un desastre

reviews.comment:
Se comen ricas tartas caseras. Hay d zapallitos, de pollo y de jamón y queso. Muy ricas. También tengo q mencionar los baños muy limpios.

(Translated by Google)
They have delicious homemade tarts. They have zucchini, chicken, and ham and cheese tarts. Very tasty. I also have to mention the very clean restrooms.

reviews.comment:
La atencion es muy buena, tanto los playeros como el full service.
Lo unico medio bajo el baño de hombres, un poco decaído en limpieza.

(Translated by Google)
The service is very good, both at the beach and at the full-service restaurant.
The only thing that's a bit poor is the men's restroom, which is a bit lacking in cleanliness.
